channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed

item.title: Senate Impeachment Trial of Vice President Sara Duterte Begins
item.description: The impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte commenced on July 6, 2026, with the Senate convening as an impeachment court. Senators act as trial judges, overseeing proceedings that will span t...

item.title: Wests Tigers Hooker Suffering After Head Collision With Teammate
item.description: In a disturbing incident during an NRL match, Wests Tigers hooker Salma Nour was forced from the field after sustaining a severe head collision with her teammate Sarah Togatuki. The clash occurred dur...

item.title: Queensland expands mandatory sentencing for youth breaching bail conditions
item.description: The Queensland government has announced new laws under the 'Adult Time, Adult Crime' policy framework, which will impose minimum mandatory imprisonment on young offenders who breach bail conditions. P...

item.title: Google Ad Satirizes AI Collaboration in Historical Context

item.title: Progress and Challenges in Implementing Phase Two of the AARTO Act

item.title: Governor Zulum disburses N5.81bn to settle gratuity payments for retirees and deceased workers' families
item.description: Borno State Governor Prof. Babagana Umara Zulum has released N5.81 billion in cheques to address outstanding gratuity payments for retired civil servants and families of deceased workers. The disburse...

item.title: Monsoon remains in active phase over central India
